consistency.notes: The spell description aligns with standard D&D 5e mechanics for damaging spells, including scaling at higher levels and specific interactions with different target types (creatures, plants, undead/constructs).

quality.notes: The formatting is clear. The different effects based on the target (plant creatures vs. non-magical plants) are well-defined and mechanically significant.

mechanics.core_mechanic: Direct damage (necrotic) with a Constitution saving throw.
mechanics.save_difficulty: Standard for direct damage spells of this level.
mechanics.scaling: Correctly implemented: +1d8 damage per slot level above 4th.
special_interactions: Disadvantage on save and maximum damage for plant creatures/magical plants.
Automatic destruction (no save) for non-magical plants.
No effect on undead or constructs.
mechanics.potential_issues: None identified. The mechanics are robust for all specified targets.
